title: Takara PrimeSTAR Max PCR
description: Takara Bio PrimeSTAR Max DNA Polymerase 2X premix: 50 uL fast high-fidelity reaction at 5 sec/kb extension.

payload.notes: Vendor: Takara Bio, PrimeSTAR Max DNA Polymerase (Cat. R045A), a 2X premix. Very fast: 5 sec/kb extension at 72 C when template <= 200 ng/50 uL (range 5-10 sec/kb). For template >200 ng/50 uL use 30-60 sec/kb. Annealing default 55 C; annealing TIME 5 sec (primer Tm >= 55 C) or 15 sec (Tm < 55 C). The 55 C shown is the default starting point. Takara publishes no long initial-denaturation, final-extension, or hold step (cycling begins at 98 C/10 sec). 30-35 cycles. Do not use uracil- or inosine-containing templates/primers. Source: https://www.takarabio.com/documents/User%20Manual/R045Q/R045Q_e.v1108Da.pdf
